title: Senior Plant Manager at Luminous Power Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Luminous Power Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
